## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager interview with Ryan Gurian for SEO Specialist role at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/wbBT7Hb-5kKhtueyib12PchH5N-7NzLT?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX seeks an IC floater for high-level SEO strategy across 40+ clients, focusing on content development and AI-driven workflows](https://fathom.video/share/wbBT7Hb-5kKhtueyib12PchH5N-7NzLT?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Role involves periodic audits, strategy shifts, and experimentation with emerging SEO trends (e.g., GEO, LLMs)](https://fathom.video/share/wbBT7Hb-5kKhtueyib12PchH5N-7NzLT?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
  - [Ryan has 7+ years of SEO experience across e-commerce, manufacturing, and local SEO, with strong technical skills and client communication abilities](https://fathom.video/share/wbBT7Hb-5kKhtueyib12PchH5N-7NzLT?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)
  - [GrowthX uses proprietary content platform, SEMrush, Looker, and is exploring tools like Profound for performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/wbBT7Hb-5kKhtueyib12PchH5N-7NzLT?tab=summary&timestamp=962.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Role Overview

  - [Agency-first approach to startup world, focusing solely on content development](https://fathom.video/share/wbBT7Hb-5kKhtueyib12PchH5N-7NzLT?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [40+ clients managed by content pods using proprietary AI-leveraged platform](https://fathom.video/share/wbBT7Hb-5kKhtueyib12PchH5N-7NzLT?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [New role: IC floater to provide high-level SEO strategy and audits across clients](https://fathom.video/share/wbBT7Hb-5kKhtueyib12PchH5N-7NzLT?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
  - [Key responsibilities:](https://fathom.video/share/wbBT7Hb-5kKhtueyib12PchH5N-7NzLT?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
      - [Periodic (e.g., quarterly) strategy evaluations and shifts](https://fathom.video/share/wbBT7Hb-5kKhtueyib12PchH5N-7NzLT?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
      - [Analytics review and progress assessment](https://fathom.video/share/wbBT7Hb-5kKhtueyib12PchH5N-7NzLT?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
      - [Experimentation with emerging trends (GEO, LLMs)](https://fathom.video/share/wbBT7Hb-5kKhtueyib12PchH5N-7NzLT?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [Identifying cross-client patterns for broader strategy implementation](https://fathom.video/share/wbBT7Hb-5kKhtueyib12PchH5N-7NzLT?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)

### GEO and LLM Experimentation

  - [Recent focus (past month) on tracking GEO and LLM impact](https://fathom.video/share/wbBT7Hb-5kKhtueyib12PchH5N-7NzLT?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
  - [Current experiments:](https://fathom.video/share/wbBT7Hb-5kKhtueyib12PchH5N-7NzLT?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
      - [LLMs TXT files for site mapping](https://fathom.video/share/wbBT7Hb-5kKhtueyib12PchH5N-7NzLT?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
      - [Tracking results from client participation in Reddit/Discord discussions](https://fathom.video/share/wbBT7Hb-5kKhtueyib12PchH5N-7NzLT?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
      - ["Summarize with ChatGPT" button on pages (not confirmed if tracked)](https://fathom.video/share/wbBT7Hb-5kKhtueyib12PchH5N-7NzLT?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
      - [Content refreshing effectiveness analysis](https://fathom.video/share/wbBT7Hb-5kKhtueyib12PchH5N-7NzLT?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
  - [Emphasis on brand authority vs. domain authority for LLM citations](https://fathom.video/share/wbBT7Hb-5kKhtueyib12PchH5N-7NzLT?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)

### Technical Stack and Tools

  - [Proprietary platform for content generation workflows](https://fathom.video/share/wbBT7Hb-5kKhtueyib12PchH5N-7NzLT?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)
  - [Scrunch for dashboard (considering Profound)](https://fathom.video/share/wbBT7Hb-5kKhtueyib12PchH5N-7NzLT?tab=summary&timestamp=946.0)
  - [Looker for performance tracking (access to clients' GA4, GSC)](https://fathom.video/share/wbBT7Hb-5kKhtueyib12PchH5N-7NzLT?tab=summary&timestamp=962.0)
  - [SEMrush for SEO analysis (not committed long-term)](https://fathom.video/share/wbBT7Hb-5kKhtueyib12PchH5N-7NzLT?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
  - [Plans to integrate performance tracking into proprietary platform](https://fathom.video/share/wbBT7Hb-5kKhtueyib12PchH5N-7NzLT?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)

### Ryan's SEO Experience

  - [7+ years in SEO across various industries (e-commerce, manufacturing, local)](https://fathom.video/share/wbBT7Hb-5kKhtueyib12PchH5N-7NzLT?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)
  - [Strong technical SEO skills (schema implementation, site audits, crawl analysis)](https://fathom.video/share/wbBT7Hb-5kKhtueyib12PchH5N-7NzLT?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Experience with challenging niches (e.g., supplements, vaping - no paid ads allowed)](https://fathom.video/share/wbBT7Hb-5kKhtueyib12PchH5N-7NzLT?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)
  - [Local SEO expertise (Google Business Profile optimization, geographical targeting)](https://fathom.video/share/wbBT7Hb-5kKhtueyib12PchH5N-7NzLT?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)
  - [Adaptable to various client needs and priorities](https://fathom.video/share/wbBT7Hb-5kKhtueyib12PchH5N-7NzLT?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)

### SEO Strategy and Client Communication

  - [Balances short-term wins (technical fixes, site speed) with long-term strategy](https://fathom.video/share/wbBT7Hb-5kKhtueyib12PchH5N-7NzLT?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
  - [Uses "two-audience analogy" to explain SEO to non-technical clients](https://fathom.video/share/wbBT7Hb-5kKhtueyib12PchH5N-7NzLT?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
  - [Comfortable presenting to clients, creating slide decks](https://fathom.video/share/wbBT7Hb-5kKhtueyib12PchH5N-7NzLT?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)
  - [Adapts to changing client needs, balancing branded language with SEO best practices](https://fathom.video/share/wbBT7Hb-5kKhtueyib12PchH5N-7NzLT?tab=summary&timestamp=1759.0)

### Process Documentation and Project Management

  - [Experience creating process docs, Loom videos, and status reports](https://fathom.video/share/wbBT7Hb-5kKhtueyib12PchH5N-7NzLT?tab=summary&timestamp=1898.0)
  - [Adaptable to various project management tools (e.g., Basecamp, ClickUp)](https://fathom.video/share/wbBT7Hb-5kKhtueyib12PchH5N-7NzLT?tab=summary&timestamp=1946.0)
  - [Emphasis on clear, accessible documentation for team scalability](https://fathom.video/share/wbBT7Hb-5kKhtueyib12PchH5N-7NzLT?tab=summary&timestamp=1958.0)

## Next Steps

  - Ryan to prepare more specific examples of SEO experiments and strategies for next interview with Jason
  - Consider discussing Ryan's approach to balancing multiple client priorities in future conversations
  - Evaluate Ryan's technical SEO skills against GrowthX's specific client needs and proprietary platform requirements
